tracks.title: Studio Selection

tracks.rawText: 2:43AUDIO-2026-05-13-11-11-05 (Vocals)UploadReggaeton track featuring a male vocalist with a rhythmic, percussive delivery, The arrangement is built around a classic dembow rhythm with a heavy, rounded kick drum and crisp, layered snares, A syncopated, plucked synth bass provides the low-end movement, Atmospheric elements include a recurring high-pitched synth lead with a short decay and subtle ambient pads in the background, The production uses frequent vocal doubling and rhythmic ad-libs to emphasize the flow, Occasional record scratches and percussive fills transition between sections, 95 BPM, G minor2PublishRemix
tracks.title: AUDIO-2026-05-13-11-11-05 (Vocals)

tracks.rawText: 2:53SALVAJE (2) (Instrumental) (1)UploadTropical house with a bright, commercial pop production, The arrangement features a syncopated marimba-style synth lead playing a repetitive melodic hook, A deep, sub-heavy synth bass follows the kick drum pattern, Percussion consists of a crisp four-on-the-floor kick, sharp claps on the backbeat, and a shaker-driven 16th-note groove, A clean, palm-muted electric guitar provides rhythmic accents, Occasional vocal chops are processed with heavy reverb and delay, functioning as melodic textures rather than lyrical content, The track is in the key of G Major at 105 BPM2PublishRemix
tracks.title: SALVAJE (2) (Instrumental) (1)

tracks.rawText: 2:53SALVAJE (2) (Instrumental)UploadElectro-swing with a 124 BPM tempo in the key of G minor, The track features a prominent staccato synth lead playing a syncopated, bouncy melody, A walking synth bassline provides the harmonic foundation, while the drum kit maintains a steady four-on-the-floor kick with crisp hi-hats and a sharp snare on the backbeat, A bright, filtered brass section enters periodically with rhythmic stabs, The arrangement includes a breakdown with a filtered synth sweep and a build-up using a snare roll that leads back into the main groove, The production is clean with modern compression and a slight swing feel applied to the MIDI programming2PublishRemix
tracks.title: SALVAJE (2) (Instrumental)

tracks.rawText: 2:53SALVAJE (2) (Instrumental) (1)UploadTropical house with a reggaeton-influenced dembow rhythm, The track features a bright, plucked synth lead playing a syncopated melody, accompanied by a deep sub-bass and a crisp drum kit with a prominent kick and snare, A clean electric guitar provides rhythmic accents with short, muted strums, The arrangement includes occasional synth risers and white noise sweeps for transitions, The tempo is 100 BPM in the key of G major, The production is polished with light reverb on the lead synth and a side-chained compression effect on the pads to create a pumping feel against the kick drum2PublishRemix
tracks.title: SALVAJE (2) (Instrumental) (1)

tracks.rawText: 2:53SALVAJE (2) (Vocals)UploadReggaeton with a heavy dembow rhythm, The track features a deep, punchy kick drum and a crisp snare hitting the classic 3-3-2 pattern, A syncopated, percussive synth bassline provides the low-end movement, Melodic elements include a staccato, high-pitched synth lead and occasional atmospheric pads, Male vocals are delivered in a rhythmic, melodic rap style with frequent ad-libs and vocal chops, The production uses sharp transitions, riser effects, and momentary silences for rhythmic emphasis, Tempo is 95 BPM in the key of G minor2PublishRemix
tracks.title: SALVAJE (2) (Vocals)

tracks.rawText: 2:53SALVAJE (2)UploadReggaeton with a modern urban pop influence, The track features a prominent dembow rhythm driven by a punchy kick and crisp snare, A syncopated, plucked synth melody provides the harmonic core, accompanied by a deep, sub-heavy bassline that follows the kick pattern, Male vocals are processed with subtle pitch correction and light reverb, alternating between melodic singing and rhythmic rapping, Occasional record scratches and vocal ad-libs punctuate the transitions, The arrangement includes filtered synth pads and percussive fills, Key of G minor, 95 BPM2PublishRemix
tracks.title: SALVAJE (2)

tracks.rawText: 2:53SALVAJE (2)UploadReggaeton track at 90 BPM in G minor, The arrangement features a classic dembow rhythm with a heavy, rounded kick drum and crisp, layered snares, A syncopated, plucked synth melody provides the harmonic hook, complemented by a deep sub-bass that follows the kick pattern, Male vocals are processed with pitch correction and light saturation, alternating between melodic singing and rhythmic rapping, Occasional record scratches and vocal ad-libs punctuate the transitions, A bright, staccato synth brass riff appears during the chorus sections, The production uses short room reverb on the percussion and a wider stereo delay on vocal flourishes4PublishRemix
tracks.title: SALVAJE (2)

tracks.rawText: 2:43AUDIO-2026-05-13-11-11-05UploadReggaeton track at 95 BPM in G minor, A syncopated dembow rhythm features a heavy, rounded kick drum and a crisp, dry snare, A recurring four-note staccato synth pluck melody provides the melodic hook, The bassline consists of deep, sub-heavy 808 slides that follow the chord progression, Male vocals are processed with subtle pitch correction and light delay, delivered in a rhythmic, melodic rap style, Occasional record scratches and vocal ad-libs are interspersed throughout the arrangement, The production is clean with a prominent low-end and minimal reverb on the percussion5PublishRemix
tracks.title: AUDIO-2026-05-13-11-11-05

tracks.rawText: 3:14Sinaloa en Marchav5.5Latin Rap with Regional Mexican banda brass and hip hop bounce, mid-tempo swung groove; verse rides sparse tuba, snare, and chopped guitar, pre-chorus strips to handclaps and rising trumpet lines, chorus hits with full banda blasts and punchy 808 undercurrent, Lead vocal stays close-mic and gritty with doubled hook lines, gang ad-libs in the chorus, delay throws on key words, Ear candy: trumpet pickups before each drop, reversed horn swells into the hook, quick cymbal cracks into the bridge, Bright, hard-hitting, and street-leaning mix with wide brass and dry upfront drums, banda, hip hop, regional mexican, rap, latin3PublishRemix
tracks.title: Sinaloa en Marcha
